classes.name: Barbarian
classes.flavor_text: The Barbarian is known for his hardy nature, fiery temper, and ability to endure immense pain. His rage and reckless abandon allow him to lead the charge into battle.

perks.name: Axe Specialization
perks.description: While using axes, gain 3 Physical Damage.

perks.name: Berserker
perks.description: Gain 3% Physical Damage and 0.5% Move Speed for every 10% of your maximum health missing, up to 30% and 5% respectively.

perks.name: Carnage
perks.description: When you hit 2 or more players with a melee weapon within 1.5 seconds, gain 40% Physical Damage for 3 seconds.

perks.name: Crush
perks.description: While equipped with a two-handed weapon, gain the ability to destroy unreinforced containers. Also gain 0.1 Impact Power on your two-handed weapon attacks, making it easier to break blocks and parries.

perks.name: Executioner
perks.description: While using axes, gain 20% Physical Headshot Power.

perks.name: Heavy Swing
perks.description: Hitting a target with a two-handed weapon reduces their move speed by 10%.

perks.name: Iron Will
perks.description: Gain 75 Magic Resistance and ignore knockback effects. The maximum Magical Damage Reduction limit is increased to 75%.

perks.name: Morale Boost
perks.description: Recover 25 % Max Health after killing a player.

perks.name: Potion Chugger
perks.description: Gain 20% increased potency towards all drinks, while reducing the duration by 50%.

perks.name: Robust
perks.description: Gain 10% Max Health.

perks.name: Savage
perks.description: While not wearing any chest armor, gain 10% Physical Damage and 0.1 Impact Power.

perks.name: Skull Splitter
perks.description:
Targets hit by a headshot are inflicted with Bleed.

Bleed: Deals a total of 12 Physical Damage over 4 seconds.

perks.name: Treacherous Lungs
perks.description: Increases the duration of all shouting abilities by 50% and reduces their cooldown by 10%.

perks.name: Two-Hander
perks.description: When attacking with a two-handed weapon, gain 5% Physical Damage and 10% Armor Penetration.

skills.name: Achilles Strike
skills.description: Strike a target, reducing their Move Speed by 30% for 2 seconds. While debuffed, each time the target moves they receive 1 Physical Damage.

skills.name: Blood Exchange
skills.description: Lose -10 % of Max Health, but gain 15% Action Speed for 8 seconds and heal for 10% of damage dealt while active.

skills.name: Finishing Blow
skills.description: Your next attack deals an additional 5 true physical damage. If the target’s health is 20 % or lower after the attack, they are instantly killed.

skills.name: Grappling Hook
skills.description: Throws a grappling rope at a target up to 4m away, pulling them toward you.

skills.name: Hurl Weapon
skills.description: Throws an axe to deal 120% weapon damage. Can only be used when an axe is equipped as your primary weapon.

skills.name: Rage
skills.description: Gain 15 Strength, 15 Vigor, 7% Move Speed. While active, lose -15% Physical Damage Reduction for 6 seconds.

skills.name: Reckless Attack
skills.description: Grants an additional 60% Armor Penetration on your next attack, but reduces your Armor Rating by 100 while active. The effect is consumed when you hit a target or object with a melee attack.

skills.name: Savage Roar
skills.description: Frightens all enemies within a 7.5m range radius for 6 seconds reducing their Physical Damage by 30% and Move Speed by 2.5%.

skills.name: War Cry
skills.description: Gain 20% Max Health for 10 seconds. This effect applies to yourself and allies within a 7.5m radius.

skills.name: War Sacrifice
skills.description: While active, gain 8 All Attributes. In exchange, lose -10 % of your Max Health over 8 seconds.

skills.name: Whirlwind
skills.description: Spin rapidly with a two-handed weapon, dealing 80% of weapon damage to all nearby enemies. While spinning, your weapon cannot be interrupted by any impact.

classes.name: Bard
classes.flavor_text: The Bard is a weaver of moving melodies and fantastic tales. They manage to get out of the stickiest of situations using their uncanny ability to mysteriously control the mood of crowds and creatures.

perks.name: Charismatic Performance
perks.description: Upgrades a ‘good’ performance into a ‘perfect’ performance.

perks.name: Dancing Feet
perks.description: While holding an instrument, gain 10 Move Speed.

perks.name: Fermata
perks.description: Gain 5 Resourcefulness.

perks.name: Jolly Time
perks.description: Drinking ale recovers 5 Physical Heal Base, and grants 5 Move Speed while drunk.

perks.name: Lore Mastery
perks.description: Grants 30% Interaction Speed and 5 Memory Capacity Add.

perks.name: Melodic Protection
perks.description: While playing music, gain 25% Physical Damage Reduction and 25% Magical Damage Reduction.

perks.name: Rapier Mastery
perks.description: While using a Rapier, gain 3 Physical Damage and 5% Action Speed.

perks.name: Reinforced Instruments
perks.description: When attacking with an instrument, gain 50% Physical Damage.

perks.name: Story Teller
perks.description: Give all nearby party members around a 5 Will and 3 Knowledge buff.

perks.name: Superior Dexterity
perks.description: 50% faster switching time when switching between weapons/utility items.

perks.name: Wanderer's Luck
perks.description: Gain 100 Luck and increases the chance of finding high-quality items when opening treasure chests.

perks.name: War Song
perks.description: A successful performance increases nearby allies' Physical Damage by 3 for 6 seconds.

skills.name: Dissonance
skills.description:
Plays an instrument to make an unpleasant noise that silences all enemy targets for 2 seconds.
Silence: Disables skills/spells/performance abilities.

skills.name: Encore
skills.description: Resets the duration of all active music buffs on nearby party members.

skills.name: Music Memory
skills.description: Gain the ability to store up to 5 sheets of music.

skills.name: Music Memory II
skills.description: Gain the ability to store up to 5 sheets of music.

skills.name: Party Maker
skills.description: Play an instrument to grant all nearby allies immunity to drunkenness for 15 seconds. While immune, drinking alcohol restores 5 Physical Heal Base.

spells.name: Accelerando
spells.description: You and nearby allies gain 1/3/5 Move Speed per second for 6 seconds based on your performance. Stacks up to 3 times.

spells.name: Allegro
spells.description: You and nearby allies gain 3/4.5/6% Action Speed and 3/4.5/6% Spell Casting Speed per second for 6 seconds based on your performance. Stacks up to 3 times.

spells.name: Aria of Alacrity
spells.description: The performer gains 4/6/8% Action Speed for 60/120/240 seconds. Song does not stack on itself.

spells.name: Ballad of Courage
spells.description: Grants the performer 5/7/10 Physical Power for 60/120/240 seconds. Song does not stack on itself.

spells.name: Banshees Howl
spells.description: Reduces nearby enemy All Attributes by 1/2/3 for 20 seconds. Does not work on Boss or Subboss monsters.

spells.name: Beats of Alacrity
spells.description: The performer gains 4/5/6 Move Speed for 60/120/240 seconds. Song does not stack on itself.

spells.name: Chaotic Discord
spells.description: Excites nearby monsters to attack the nearest target except the performer.

spells.name: Chorale of Clarity
spells.description: Restore 8 spell memory per second of all nearby allies who rest for 8/16/24 seconds.

spells.name: Din of Darkness
spells.description: Deal 1/3/5 magical dark damage to all enemies in an area around the performer, based on performance.

spells.name: Harmonic Shield
spells.description: The performer gains 25 Armor Rating and 25 Magic Resistance for 60/120/240 seconds.

spells.name: Lament of Languor
spells.description: Reduces the Move Speed by 10 of all enemy targets in the area for 6/12/18 seconds.

spells.name: Peacemaking
spells.description: All nearby players and monsters temporarily lose the will to fight when enchanted by the channeling section of the song.

spells.name: Piercing Shrill
spells.description: Deal 20/25/30 Physical Damage to a target. Causes the echo sound effect on player targets for 3 seconds.

spells.name: Rousing Rhythms
spells.description: Nearby allies gain 2/2/2 All Attributes for 60/120/240 seconds.

spells.name: Shriek of Weakness
spells.description: Nearby enemies lose -3/-4/-5 Physical Power and -10/-20/-30 Armor Rating for 6/12/18 seconds.

spells.name: Song of Shadow
spells.description: You and all nearby allies gain invisibility for 10/20/30 seconds. Invisibility breaks upon movement.

spells.name: Song of Silence
spells.description: Interrupts all skills, spells, and songs used by nearby enemies, and prevents them from using skills, casting spells, or playing songs for 1/1.5/2 seconds. Does not work on boss or sub-boss monsters.

spells.name: Tranquility
spells.description: Restore 2 Recovery Heal of yourself and nearby allies every second while resting for 10/15/20 seconds.

spells.name: Unchained Harmony
spells.description: Open all nearby doors/containers, including locked containers. It does not work for doors that require a special key.

classes.name: Cleric
classes.flavor_text: The Cleric is a soldier of immense faith. The Cleric uses his sacred bonds to his gods to call forth the protective powers of light and to vanquish the forces of dark.

perks.name: Advanced Healer
perks.description: Gain 5 Magical Heal Base.

perks.name: Blunt Weapon Mastery
perks.description: While using a blunt weapon, gain 10% Physical Damage.

perks.name: Brewmaster
perks.description: When you drink alcohol, you no longer exhibit the detrimental drunk effects and gain 10 Strength. The duration of the drunk effect is increased by 50%.

perks.name: Faithfulness
perks.description: Gain 15% Magical Divine Damage. When a divine attack is successful, reduce their Move Speed by 15% for 1 seconds. Does not inflict while on cooldown.

perks.name: Holy Aura
perks.description: Gain 15 Armor Rating and 15 Magic Resistance. This effects both yourself and allies.

perks.name: Holy Water
perks.description: Drinking any drink removes all removable curses and harmful magic effects, and grants the Bless effect.

perks.name: Kindness
perks.description: Heal yourself for 30% of the spell's total heal amount when healing another target.

perks.name: Over Healing
perks.description: Even if the target's health is at full health, additional healing can be done by 20% of the target's maximum health. ^ degenerates at -2 % per second.

perks.name: Perseverance
perks.description: Reduces all types of incoming damage by 2.

perks.name: Protection from Evil
perks.description: Reduce the duration of all harmful effects by -300%.

perks.name: Requiem
perks.description: Resurrecting an ally revives them with 50% HP instead of a sliver of life. When reviving an ally at the Altar of Sacrifice, you do not need to sacrifice any of your own health. Using the Resurrection spell also grants 100% Spell Casting Speed.

perks.name: Undead Slaying
perks.description: Gain 20% Undead Damage against undead monsters.

skills.name: Divine Protection
skills.description: Gain 30% Physical Damage Reduction for 6 seconds.

skills.name: Holy Purification
skills.description: After channeling for 1.5 seconds, deal 100 divine Magical Damage to all undead monsters within a 7.5m radius around you.

skills.name: Judgement
skills.description: After channeling for 1 seconds, deal 25 magical divine damage to a target and reduce their Move Speed by 30% for 2 seconds. Once the channel begins on a target, crosshair targeting is no longer required. This spell has a 5m range and will fail if the target goes out of range.

skills.name: Smite
skills.description: Deal an additional 10 magical divine damage to all enemies you hit within 7 seconds. Only when melee attacking.

skills.name: Spell Memory I
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize spells to use in the dungeon.

skills.name: Spell Memory II
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize additional spells to use in the dungeon.

spells.name: Bind
spells.description: Binds the target for 0.75 seconds.

spells.name: Bless
spells.description: Grants the target 2 All Attributes for 30 seconds. Self cast if no target is found.

spells.name: Cleanse
spells.description: Removes poison and curse effects from the target. Self cast if no target is found.

spells.name: Divine Strike
spells.description: Grants the target 5 Physical Damage for 12 seconds. Self cast if no target is found.

spells.name: Earthquake
spells.description: Channel an earthquake in a 2.5m radius over 6 seconds. Any target within the area is dealt 7 magical earth damage per step and receives -50% Move Speed reduction.

spells.name: Holy Light
spells.description: Heals a target for 35 Magical Heal Base or deals 100 magical divine damage to an undead target.

spells.name: Holy Strike
spells.description: Deal 20 magical divine damage to all targets in an area, blinding them for 4 seconds.

spells.name: Lesser Heal
spells.description: Heals the target for 20 Magical Heal Base. Self cast if no target is found.

spells.name: Locust Swarm
spells.description: Channel a swarm of locusts in a 3m radius over 6 seconds. Any target within the area is dealt 13 magical divine damage per 1 second. The target also suffers reduced Magical Healing by 50% and Physical Healing by 50%.

spells.name: Protection
spells.description: Grants the target a shield that blocks 20 physical damage for 8 seconds.

spells.name: Resurrection
spells.description: Target an ally to resurrect them from the dead (the corpse must have a soul heart).

spells.name: Sanctuary
spells.description: Channel for 5 seconds, healing all targets within 3.5m for 5 per second and deals 14 magical divine damage per second to the undead.

classes.name: Druid
classes.flavor_text: The Druid is a spirit mage with a deep connection to nature. Able to wield the powers of the wilderness, they can even transform their bodies to mimic the powers of beasts.

perks.name: Animal Kinship
perks.description: Not all animals and insects attack first.

perks.name: Dreamwalk
perks.description: When you take damage, your Magical Power increases by 5 for 2 seconds and you become spiritual. The player does not collide with other targets and cannot attack or use skills, but can cast spells. This ability triggers once every 18 seconds.

perks.name: Enhanced Wildness
perks.description: While you are in animal form, you gain 5% Physical Damage and 20 Armor Rating.

perks.name: Force of Nature
perks.description: When you heal a target, the target gains 5 Physical Power for 3 seconds.

perks.name: Herbal Sensing
perks.description: Detects nearby herbs and increases the chance of gathering higher-grade herbs.

perks.name: Lifebloom Aura
perks.description: Restores an additional 1 health to target when caster heals self or allies within aura range. Disables shapeshift.

perks.name: Natural Healing
perks.description: Recover yourself and nearby allies 1 Magical Heal Base every 3 seconds.

perks.name: Prophecy
perks.description: Targets near the aiming point are automatically selected, and single-target magic aimed at the selected target will not miss.

perks.name: Shapeshift Mastery
perks.description: Reduces shapeshifting time by 25% and reduces the cooldown of Wild skills by 25%, but prevents the use of spirit spells.

perks.name: Spirit Bond
perks.description: Once every 1 second, You will receive 20% of damage received by party members instead. Can receive damage up to 20.

perks.name: Spirit Magic Mastery
perks.description: When you cast spirit magic, you gain 10 Magical Power.

perks.name: Sun and Moon
perks.description: Nearby allies gain 3 Vigor and 5 Magical Power.

perks.name: Thorn Coat
perks.description: When melee attacked, return 5 true physical damage to the attacker.

skills.name: Shapeshift Memory
skills.description: Transforms into the selected creature. Tools cannot be used in a non-human state.

skills.name: Shapeshift Memory II
skills.description: Transforms into the selected creature. Tools cannot be used in a non-human state.

skills.name: Spell Memory I
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize spells to use in the dungeon.

skills.name: Spell Memory II
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize additional spells to use in the dungeon.

spells.name: Barkskin Armor
spells.description: Encloses the target in a protective bark for 10 seconds, increasing Armor Rating by 50, Headshot Damage Reduction by 10%.

spells.name: Dreamfire
spells.description: Deals 15 magical spirit damage to all enemies in an area. Instantly heals caster and allies currently affected by Nature’s Touch for 10 Magical Heal Base per target damaged. This effect applies within a 7 m radius of the caster.

spells.name: Entangling Vines
spells.description: Spreads roots across the floor in a 1m radius that last for 3 seconds. Any targets that pass through the area of ​​effect are frozen in place for 1 seconds. After the effect removed, the target gets immunity to the entangling effects for 1 seconds.

spells.name: Mending Grove
spells.description: While standing on the ground, create a forest area centered around you within a 3m radius. Targets in the area gain 10% Max Health and are healed for 10 Magical Heal Base per second.

spells.name: Nature's Touch
spells.description: The target gains 15 Recoverable Health. Also healed 15 Magical Heal Base over 10 seconds. Casts instantly and casts on yourself if no target is found.

spells.name: Orb of Nature
spells.description: Fires an orb that deals 15 magical spirit damage on contact with an enemy, or grants Nature's Touch on contact with an ally.

spells.name: Restore
spells.description: Restore the health of all allies within 3m radius by 20 Magical Heal Base for 10 seconds.

spells.name: Summon Treant
spells.description: Summons a treant to fight with you for 24 seconds. Treants become more powerful when summoned underwater.

spells.name: Thorn Barrier
spells.description: Creates a thorn barrier that lasts for 4 seconds. Any character standing near the thorn barrier will takes 4 Physical Damage per second.

spells.name: Tree of Life
spells.description: Sprout a tree of life, granting 3 All Attributes and granting 20 Recoverable Health over 8 seconds. Also heals for 15 Magical Heal Base over 8 seconds. Cannot cast on self.

shapeshifts.name: Bear
shapeshifts.description:
Transform into a wild bear. Slow and too large to pass through single doors. Gain 50% Physical Damage Reduction, 10% Projectile Damage Reduction and 50% Max Health. Lose -20% Move Speed and -30% Action Speed. Your jump lowered by 30%.

[Left-Click] Swipe
Claws the target with your right hand, inflicting Strength curve* 1000%+ 27 Physical Damage and pushing the target away.

[Right-Click] Bash
Raise your body and deal Strength curve* 1000%+ 41 Physical Damage with both hands, and gain the ability to push targets away and destroy unreinforced doors and containers.

[Wild] Wild Fury
For 8 seconds, Physical Damage Reduction increases by 20% and Magical Damage Reduction increases by 20%.
shapeshifts.form_skill_description: Gain 20% Physical Damage Reduction and 20% Magical Damage Reduction for 8 seconds.

shapeshifts.name: Chicken
shapeshifts.description:
Transform into a chicken. Able to fly for a while by spreading wings. Lose -60% Max Health, -60% Physical Healing and -60% Magical Healing.

[Left-Click] Pecking
Pecks the target with its beak, inflicting Resourcefulness curve* 1000%+ 23 Physical Damage. This attack penetrate 300 % of target’s armor.

[Right-Click] Clucking
The chicken clucks loudly.

[Wild] Insect Predation
Eats crawling insects and heals Resourcefulness curve* 4000% Physical Heal Base.
shapeshifts.form_skill_description: Eats crawling insects and recovers health by 4000 % of your Resourcefulness curve.

shapeshifts.name: Panther
shapeshifts.description:
Transform into a wild panther. Very quick and agile. Gain 5 Move Speed. Lose -30% Physical Damage Reduction, -10% Physical Healing and -10% Magical Healing. Your jump is 20% higher.

[Left-Click] Scratch
Claws the target with his right hand, inflicting Agility curve* 1000%+ 23 Physical Damage and causing the target to bleed, inflicting 5 Physical Damage for 3 seconds.

[Right-Click] Neckbite
Bite the target's neck, inflicting Agility curve* 1000%+ 25 Physical Damage. While you are frenzied, Neckbite silences the target for 0.1 seconds.

[Wild] Rush
Rush forward, entering a frenzied state for 2 seconds after initiating the rush. You can use attacks while jumping, and this can be used in the air.
shapeshifts.form_skill_description: Rush forward, entering a frenzied state for 2 seconds after initiating the rush. You can use attacks while jumping, and this can be used in the air.

shapeshifts.name: Penguin
shapeshifts.description:
Transforms into a penguin. Slow on land, but very fast in water. Lose -40% Max Health, -40% Physical Healing and -40% Magical Healing.

[Left-Click] Sharp Beak
Bites the target with its beak, dealing Will curve* 1000%+ 17 Physical Damage and causing bleeding, inflicting 3 Physical Damage over 3 seconds

[Right-Click] Water Cannon
After casting, spit a stream of water forward, dealing Will curve * 100%+ 15 magical ice damage.

[Wild] Penguin Dash
Gain 15% Move Speed while in water for 3 seconds.
shapeshifts.form_skill_description: Gain 15% Move Speed while in water for 3 seconds.

shapeshifts.name: Rat
shapeshifts.description:
Transform into a wild rat. Small in size and moves quickly, but has very little stamina. Lose -95% Max Health, -100% Physical Damage Reduction, -100% Magical Damage Reduction, -95% Physical Healing and -95% Magical Healing. Your jump is 10% higher.

[Left-Click] Infected Fangs
Bites the target, inflicting 1 Physical Damage and spreading a plague that deals 3 Magical Damage for 3 seconds.

[Right-Click] Squeak
Makes a squeak.

[Wild] Survival Instinct
Gain 10 Max Health, 20 Move Speed for 4 seconds. When the effect ends, lose -20% Move Speed for 3 seconds.
shapeshifts.form_skill_description: Gain 10 Max Health, 20 Move Speed for 4 seconds. After the effect over, lose -20% Move Speed for 3 seconds.

classes.name: Fighter
classes.flavor_text: The Fighter is a jack of all trades when it comes to combat. Well-versed with a multitude of weapons and armaments, the Fighter can hold his own against anyone.

perks.name: Adrenaline Spike
perks.description: When your health goes below 40%, gain 15% Action Speed, 3% Move Speed, and 30% Interaction Speed for 12 seconds, and suffer no penalty from using the Adrenaline Rush skill.

perks.name: Barricade
perks.description: While in defensive stance, gain 75 Armor Rating and 75 Magic Resistance.

perks.name: Combo Attack
perks.description: When you successfully land consecutive melee attacks within 2 seconds, gain 10% Physical Damage per stack, up to 2 stacks.

perks.name: Counterattack
perks.description: When you successfully block an attack, gain 10% Move Speed and 10% Action Speed for 3 seconds.

perks.name: Defense Mastery
perks.description: Gain an additional 15% Armor Rating from equipped armor. The maximum Physical Damage Reduction limit is Increased to 75%.

perks.name: Dual Wield
perks.description: While you have weapons equipped in both hands, gain 10% Action Speed.

perks.name: Last Bastion
perks.description: When your Health falls to 33% or below, you gain 150 Armor Rating, 50 Magic Resistance and 30% Projectile Damage Reduction for 8 seconds.

perks.name: Projectile Resistance
perks.description: Gain 10% Projectile Damage Reduction. While in defensive stance, gain an additional 15% Projectile Damage Reduction.

perks.name: Shield Mastery
perks.description: While in defensive stance, gain 10% Move Speed. When you successfully block an attack, gain 50% Action Speed towards your next block.

perks.name: Slayer
perks.description: While holding a weapon in each hand, gain 5 Physical Damage, 10 Move Speed but lose the ability to equip plate armor.

perks.name: Survivalist Tongue
perks.description: All consumables have a {0}% effect increase.

perks.name: Swift
perks.description: Reduces the Move Speed Penalty by 30%. Only applies to armor-related penalties.

perks.name: Sword Mastery
perks.description: When using a sword-type weapon, gain 2 Physical Damage and 5% Action Speed. Also gain 10 Move Speed when taking a defensive stance with your sword.

perks.name: Veteran Instinct
perks.description: When you enter combat, Physical Damage Reduction is increased by 10% of its current value and Physical Damage is increased by 10% for 4 seconds.

perks.name: Weapon Guard
perks.description: While blocking with a weapon, gain 1 Impact Resistance and 5% Physical Damage Reduction. Upon a successful block, you gain 10% Physical Damage for 2 seconds.

perks.name: Weapon Mastery
perks.description: Gain the ability to use any weapon.

skills.name: Adrenaline Rush
skills.description: Gain 15% Action Speed, 5% Move Speed for 8 seconds. After the duration ends, lose -8% Action Speed and -4% Move Speed for 2 seconds.

skills.name: Breakthrough
skills.description: Removes debuffs that slow move speed, grants a 7 Move Speed, and ignores all move speed debuff effects for 8 seconds.

skills.name: Disarm
skills.description: If you block a melee attack with your weapon within 8 seconds, you disarm the attacker for 1 seconds. Disarmed targets cannot use weapons. This effect can only be applied once and is consumed when you block a melee attack. Can only be used while a weapon is equipped.

skills.name: Fortified Ground
skills.description: Deploys a rallying banner for 45 seconds. Allies within 33m of the banner have All Attributes increased by 3.

skills.name: Perfect Block
skills.description: Gain 5 Impact Resistance for 8 seconds.

skills.name: Pommel Strike
skills.description:
When attacking with the hilt while a one-handed weapon is equipped as your main weapon, it deals an additional 15 Physical Damage and silences the target. If the silence interrupts the enemy’s action, it deals an additional 10 Physical Damage and reduces Move Speed by 50% for 2 seconds.

Silence: Disables skills/spells/performance abilities.

skills.name: Second Wind
skills.description: Recover 40 % Max Health over 12 seconds. Additionally, Second Wind removes the negative effects of Adrenaline Rush.

skills.name: Shield Slam
skills.description: Inflicts 30 Physical Damage on the target, and reduces the targets Move Speed by 20% for 3 seconds.

skills.name: Spell Reflection
skills.description: While blocking, gain the ability to reflect spells. This buff persists until triggered, lasting 5 seconds. Before activation, gain 15% Magical Damage Reduction.

skills.name: Sprint
skills.description: Gain 3 stacks of Momentum, granting 10 Move Speed per stack. Lose 1 stack every 2 seconds.

skills.name: Taunt
skills.description: Increases the aggro value to all monsters within a 7.5m area by 300%. Gain 12% Physical Damage Reduction and 12% Magical Damage Reduction for 8 seconds

skills.name: Victory Strike
skills.description: Your next attack deals an additional 40% Physical Damage. If this attack kills a player, the skill triggers again with no cooldown.

classes.name: Ranger
classes.flavor_text: The Ranger is an excellent survivalist. With a keen eye and quick hands, the Ranger tracks his enemies, sets traps and ambushes unsuspecting prey.

perks.name: Camping Mastery
perks.description: Instantly place a campfire and increase its duration by 100%.

perks.name: Chase
perks.description: Detect recent enemy footsteps and can hear enemy footstep sounds from farther away.

perks.name: Crippling Shot
perks.description: Hitting the target’s leg reduces their Move Speed by 40% for 1 seconds.

perks.name: Crossbow Mastery
perks.description: While using a crossbow, gain 5% Physical Damage and an additional 50% Action Speed while reloading.

perks.name: Kinesthesia
perks.description: When moving with the bowstring drawn, move speed bonus increases by 15%.

perks.name: Longshot Expert
perks.description: Deals additional damage as the distance to the target increases, up to 20 Physical Damage.

perks.name: Nimble Hands
perks.description: When using a bow, increases your draw speed by 15%.

perks.name: Point-Blank Expert
perks.description: Deals an additional 3 true physical damage to targets within 300m.

perks.name: Purge Shot
perks.description: Each time you hit a target with a ranged weapon, remove one random magical buff and deal 3 Magical Damage True.

perks.name: Quick Reload
perks.description: When reloading a bow-type or firearm-type weapon, gain 50% Action Speed.

perks.name: Ranged Weapons Mastery
perks.description: When attacking with a ranged weapon, gain 5% Physical Damage.

perks.name: Sharpshooter
perks.description: When attacking with a ranged weapon, gain 15% Physical Headshot Power.

perks.name: Spear Proficiency
perks.description: Gain the ability to equip spears.

perks.name: Trap Mastery
perks.description: Instantly place trap items and recover them when disarmed.

perks.name: Windfletch
perks.description: Increases projectile speed of arrows and bolts by 25%.

skills.name: Backstep
skills.description: Quickly retreats a short distance. It can also be used in the air.

skills.name: Field Ration
skills.description: Forage food and recover 40 Physical Heal Base.

skills.name: Forceful Shot
skills.description: When using a bow-type weapon, gain the ability to knock targets back for 10 seconds.

skills.name: Multishot
skills.description: Fire 5 arrows at once in a cone shaped dispersion.

skills.name: Penetrating Shot
skills.description: Gain 50% Headshot Penetration and 25% Armor Penetration for 8 seconds. Bow and crossbow attacks pierce targets.

skills.name: Quick Fire
skills.description: Gain an additional 50% Action Speed for 8 seconds while using bow-type weapons.

skills.name: Quickshot
skills.description: Fire arrows in a quick succession. Each bow-type will fire a different amount of arrows.

skills.name: True Shot
skills.description: Projectile flight speed is greatly increased, also increasing Physical Damage by 8% for 8 seconds.

classes.name: Rogue
classes.flavor_text: The Rogue is a master of deception able to silently slip between the shadows to work his dastardly deeds. His dexterous hands enable him to quickly loot riches, pick locks, and disable various traps.

perks.name: Ambush
perks.description: When coming out of hide, you gain an additional 10% Move Speed and 25% Physical Damage for 3 seconds. If the melee attack is successful, the effect disappears.

perks.name: Back Attack
perks.description: When attacking a target from behind, gain 30% Backstab Damage.

perks.name: Creep
perks.description: While crouch walking, reduce the volume of footsteps significantly and gain 10% Move Speed.

perks.name: Dagger Mastery
perks.description: When using a dagger, gain 10% Physical Damage and 1 true physical damage.

perks.name: Double Jump
perks.description: You gain the ability to jump an additional time in the air.

perks.name: Hand Crossbow Mastery
perks.description: Gain the ability to equip the Hand Crossbow, while using it gain 2 Physical Damage.

perks.name: Hide Mastery
perks.description: Increases the duration of the hide skill by 1.5 times and reduces its cooldown time by 30%.

perks.name: Jokester
perks.description: Give all party members 2 All Attributes.

perks.name: Lethal Mark
perks.description: A target hit by a throwing knife loses -15% Physical Damage Reduction for 8 seconds. This effect does not stack on the same target.

perks.name: Pickpocket
perks.description: Steal items from nearby enemies. Additionally, your hide will not be revealed when you are bumped into. Items worn in utility slots do not appear on the waist.

perks.name: Poisoned Weapon
perks.description: A successful attack applies poison that deals 4 Magical Damage and reduces their Physical Healing by 10% and Magical Healing by 10% over 4 seconds. The poison can stack up to 5 times.

perks.name: Stealth
perks.description: While hiding, gain the ability to move 10 steps while crouching or slow walking. Also gain 3 Move Speed per remaining step.

perks.name: Thrust
perks.description: While using dagger, gain an additional 20% Armor Penetration.

perks.name: Traps and Locks
perks.description: You can unlock locked locks without a lockpick and detect traps within a certain range to disarm them.

perks.name: Trickster
perks.description: While using throwing weapons, gain 25% Action Speed.

skills.name: Caltrops
skills.description: Drops Caltrops at your feet that deal 10 Physical Damage and slows the Move Speed by 50% of anything that steps on them for 3 seconds.

skills.name: Cut Throat
skills.description: When you successfully hit a target, silence them for 2 seconds, disabling the targets skills/spells/performance abilities.

skills.name: Hide
skills.description: Become invisible for 8 seconds. It is possible to change your equipment in this state. You are revealed when you attempt an action, such as moving, attacking, or using a skill.

skills.name: Rupture
skills.description: The next successful attack causes the target to bleed for 20 Physical Damage over 5 seconds. The buff is consumed when an attack hits an object or target.

skills.name: Smoke Pot
skills.description: A smoke pot is deployed creating a smoke screen. The smoke screen lasts 8 seconds and covers a 6m area.When an enemy target enters the smoke screen, reduces their Move Speed by 5%.

skills.name: Sneak Attack
skills.description: Your next melee attack deals an additional 10 Physical Damage. If the target is not in combat, it deals an additional 20 Physical Damage.

skills.name: Tumbling
skills.description: When used, backtumbles in the opposite direction the player is facing.

skills.name: Weakpoint Attack
skills.description: When you successfully hit a target, reduce their Armor Rating by 40% for 3 seconds. Only when melee attacking.

classes.name: Sorcerer
classes.flavor_text: The Sorcerer is a master of the elements and can weave together multiple spells to devastating results. With an innate aptitude for magic, they can cast spells using their bare hands.

perks.name: Air Mastery
perks.description: Gain 250% Magical Air Knockback Mod and 500% Magical Air Damage Mod.

perks.name: Apex of Sorcery
perks.description: While casting spells, reduce movement speed by 99%, but gain 50% Magical Damage and 50% Spell Casting Speed.

perks.name: Elemental Fury
perks.description: For every 1% of health lost, gain a 0.5% cooldown reduction bonus and 0.25% magical damage bonus.

perks.name: Innate Talent
perks.description: When casting spells with bare hands, gain 5 Magical Power and 10% Spell Casting Speed.

perks.name: Lightning Mastery
perks.description: Gain 25% Magical Lightning Damage. Once every 2 seconds while dealing lightning magical damage, inflict electric shock for 2 seconds, transferring 5 magical lightning damage to the closest target within 2m of the primary target.

perks.name: Mana Flow
perks.description: For each successful spell cast, gain 5% Magical Damage. This effect stacks up to 3 times and resets on the next successful cast.

perks.name: Mana Fold
perks.description: Reduce all spell cooldowns by 25%, but lose -15% Spell Casting Speed.

perks.name: Merged Might
perks.description: When casting a merge spell, gain 5 Magical Power. After casting, gain a 5% Move Speed for 2 seconds.

perks.name: Spell Merge
perks.description: While using bare hands, casting two combinable spells simultaneously allows you to use a new spell.

perks.name: Spell Sculpting
perks.description: Increases the range of all spells by 25% and the area of ​​effect by 25%, but increases the cooldown time by 25%.

perks.name: Spell Stride
perks.description: Gain 30% Move Speed while casting two spells simultaneously.

perks.name: Time Distortion
perks.description: Reduces cast time of all spells by 50%, but increases cooldown time for all spells by 200%.

skills.name: Sorcery I
skills.description: Gain the ability to use sorcery in the dungeon.

skills.name: Sorcery II
skills.description: Gain the ability to use sorcery in the dungeon.

spells.name: Eruption
spells.description: Cause a ground explosion, dealing 20 magical earth damage and lifting all targets within the area into the air.

spells.name: Fire Arrow
spells.description:
Fire 3 homing arrows in a radial pattern, each dealing 7 magical fire damage and inflicting burn over 3 seconds.

Burn: The target takes 3 magical fire damage.

spells.name: Fire Orb
spells.description:
Launch a fire orb forward, dealing 5 magical fire damage per second to nearby targets. The orb lasts for 6 seconds and deals 25 magical fire damage to targets it touches. Upon contact, it explodes, dealing 10 magical fire damage to nearby targets and inflicting burn over 3 seconds.

Burn: The target takes 5 magical fire damage.

spells.name: Flamestrike
spells.description:
Create a fire pillar lasting 3 seconds, dealing 30 magical fire damage on creation and 10 magical fire damage per second to enemies inside while inflicting burn over 3 seconds.

Burn: The target takes 3 magical fire damage.

spells.name: Glaciate
spells.description:
Envelop your weapon in ice for 15 seconds, inflicting frostbite for 1 seconds on hit.

Frostbite: The target loses -5% Move Speed and -20% Action Speed.

spells.name: Ice Spear
spells.description: Fire an ice spear that deals 30 magical ice damage, piercing and damaging all targets in its path.

spells.name: Levitation
spells.description: Lift the target into the air and gently lower them back down.

spells.name: Lightning Bolt
spells.description:
Fire a lightning beam for 5 seconds, electrifying the target and dealing 5 magical lightning damage per second.

Electrified: The target loses -20% Move Speed.

spells.name: Lightning Sphere
spells.description:
Surround yourself with an electromagnetic field for 5 seconds, shocking all nearby targets for 5 magical lightning damage per second.

Electrified: The target loses -20% Move Speed.

spells.name: Suppress Sorcery
spells.description: Suppresses the caster's sorcery abilities.

spells.name: Suppress Sorcery
spells.description: Suppresses the caster's sorcery abilities.

spells.name: Stone Skin
spells.description: Surround yourself with stone for 15 seconds, gaining 15% Physical Damage Reduction and 5% Physical Damage, but losing -5 Move Speed.

spells.name: Summon Earth Elemental
spells.description: Summon an Earth Elemental for 24 seconds. The Earth Elemental increases the caster's Armor Rating by 50 and hurls rocks at nearby enemies, dealing 40 Physical Damage.

spells.name: Vortex
spells.description: Create a vortex centered on the caster. Targets touching the vortex take 15 Magical Air Damage Base and are pushed back.

spells.name: Water Bolt
spells.description:
Launch a condensed water orb, dealing 15 magical ice damage to targets it touches and inflicting wet for 2 seconds. The orb stops upon hitting an object or reaching its maximum range and lasts for 12 seconds. Up to 3 water orbs can exist simultaneously.

Wet: The target loses -20% Move Speed and jump height is reduced by 30%.

spells.name: Windblast
spells.description: Deal 10 Magical Air Damage Base to the target and push them back.

classes.name: Warlock
classes.flavor_text: The Warlock is a brooding manipulator of dark magic. They sacrifice their life force to call upon unknown forces of pain and evil. A worthy adversary proficient in both magic and weapons.

perks.name: Antimagic
perks.description: Gain 200% magical damage reduction except against divine magic.

perks.name: Curse Mastery
perks.description: Gain 30% duration towards all curses you cast.

perks.name: Dark Enhancement
perks.description: Gain 20% Magical Dark Damage towards dark magic spells.

perks.name: Dark Reflection
perks.description: While active, reflect 15 magical dark damage to the melee attacker. Does not reflect while on cooldown.

perks.name: Demon Armor
perks.description: Gain the ability to equip plate armor, but lose -10% Spell Casting Speed.

perks.name: Immortal Lament
perks.description: Casting spells will no longer take you below 1 health. When your health falls below 5%, gain 100% increased Magical Healing for 5 seconds.

perks.name: Infernal Pledge
perks.description: Reduces damage taken from Undead and Demons by 400%.

perks.name: Malice
perks.description: Gain 15% Will Mod.

perks.name: Shadow Touch
perks.description: Dealing physical damage to an enemy with a melee weapon deals 2 magical dark damage true and heals you for 2 Magical Heal Base.

perks.name: Soul Collector
perks.description: When you deal the final blow to an enemy, one darkness shard is collected. Gain 1 All Attributes, 33% Magical Dark Damage for each shard collected, up to a maximum of 3 shards. When you deal dark magic damage, consume all collected shards.

perks.name: Torture Mastery
perks.description: All curses inflicted upon enemies restores 2 Recovery Heal to the caster with each instance of damage dealt. All Warlock spell costs are doubled when this perk is equipped.

perks.name: Vampirism
perks.description: Gain 20% Magical Healing.

skills.name: Blood Pact
skills.description:
Take the form of your contracted demon, gaining an additional 50 Max Health, 50 Armor Rating, and 50 Magic Resistance. Your entire body is covered in Abyssal Flame, taking 1 % damage per second and dealing 2 Magical Damage per second to nearby characters. Once activated, the effect cannot be stopped until the contract is complete. Additionally, by consuming Darkness Shards, you gain 1 All Attributes, 33% Magical Dark Damage for each Darkness Shard consumed. When you become a demon your skills change to demon-only skills.

Left-Click: Use equipped item. If no item is equipped, then performs bare-handed attack. Perform up to 4 combo attacks using both hands.

Right-Click: Use equipped item. If no item is equipped, then fires a bolt of darkness.

skills.name: Blow of Corruption
skills.description: Your next physical attack deals 12 magical evil damage to the target and reduces their Physical Healing by 80% and Magical Healing by 80% for 12 seconds.

skills.name: Dark Offering
skills.description: Channel your mind, sacrificing -10 % of your max health per second to gain 5% Magical Damage and 5% Physical Damage. This bonus lasts for 60 seconds.

skills.name: Phantomize
skills.description: Phase through melee attacks and projectiles for 4 seconds. While active, gain 5% Move Speed and lose -50% Magical Damage Reduction. During this period you can only move and do not collide with other players or monsters.

skills.name: Spell Memory I
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize spells to use in the dungeon.

skills.name: Spell Memory II
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize additional spells to use in the dungeon.

spells.name: Bloodstained Blade
spells.description: While active, the target gains 5 Physical Damage for 20 seconds. When the target swings their weapon, they take 3 magical evil damage. Self cast if no target is found.

spells.name: Bolt of Darkness
spells.description: Fires a bolt that deals 20 magical dark damage to the target.

spells.name: Curse of Pain
spells.description: Deal 15 magical evil damage to the target instantly. Additionally, deal 15 magical evil damage distributed over 8 seconds.

spells.name: Curse of Weakness
spells.description: Reduce the target All Attributes by 25%, Physical Damage Reduction by 15%, Magical Damage Reduction by 15% for 12 seconds.

spells.name: Eldritch Shield
spells.description: Grants the target a shield that protects against 25 magical damage for 15 seconds. When the shield absorbs its maximum damage, gain 30% Magical Dark Damage and 50% Spell Casting Speed towards the next dark spell cast within 6 seconds.

spells.name: Evil Eye
spells.description: Channel for 1 seconds and summon an evil eye that can be possessed by the caster for 30 seconds.

spells.name: Flame Walker
spells.description: While active, gain the ability to leave a trail of Hellfire for 6 seconds. Each step leaves a trail that lasts for 4 seconds. Targets that enter the flame area will burn, taking 5 magical fire damage per 0.2 second.

spells.name: Hellfire
spells.description: Cast eternal hellfire and blast it towards the targets. Deal 60 magical fire damage per second to any target within the area of effect. The hellfire does not dissipate when it reaches a target.

spells.name: Life Drain
spells.description: Channel for 7.5 seconds, dealing 5 magical evil damage to the target per second. Convert a portion of the damage dealt into health for the caster.

spells.name: Power of Sacrifice
spells.description: Deal 3 magical evil damage per second to the target while increasing their Strength by 15 and Vigor by 15 for 12 seconds. Self casts if no target is found.

spells.name: Ray of Darkness
spells.description: Channel a dark beam dealing 12 magical dark damage per second to any target the beam touches. Moving and aiming are possible while channeling.

spells.name: Spell Predation
spells.description:
Consume up to all removable magical buffs from the enemy and gain 1 Darkness Shard per effect. Inflict 3 evil Magical Damage per effect.

Darkness Shard : Each Darkness Shard grants 1 All Attributes, 33% Magical Dark Damage and can store up to 3. This effect is consumed when casting a dark spell.

spells.name: Summon Hydra
spells.description: Summon a Hydra that spits fireballs dealing 10 magical fire damage to enemy targets for 10 seconds. The hydra can also detect hidden targets.

classes.name: Wizard
classes.flavor_text: The Wizard calls forth the immense powers of magic to suit his needs. Whether that means summoning a powerful fireball to cast asunder his foes or to temporarily vanishing into thin air, his incantations are a sight to behold.

perks.name: Arcane Feedback
perks.description: When you deal damage with an arcane spell, gain a stacking bonus granting 3% Spell Casting Speed and 30% Magical Arcane Damage Mod per stack for 7 seconds. This skill can stack up to 5 times and the duration resets with each successful stack.

perks.name: Arcane Mastery
perks.description: Gain 50% Magical Arcane Damage Mod and reduce the cast time of arcane spells by 0.5 seconds.

perks.name: Fire Mastery
perks.description: Gain 5% Magical Fire Damage. The duration of applied burns are increased by 2 seconds, and a burned target reduces Physical Healing by 50% and Magical Healing by 50% for 4 seconds.

perks.name: Ice Mastery
perks.description: Dealing damage with ice magic freezes the target's feet and prevents them from moving for 0.5 seconds.

perks.name: Ice Shield
perks.description:
Gain 20 Armor Rating. Inflict frostbite for 0.5 seconds on melee attacker. Does not inflict while on cooldown.

Frostbite: The target loses -20% Move Speed and -20% Action Speed.

perks.name: Mana Surge
perks.description: Gain 10% Magical Damage.

perks.name: Melt
perks.description: When you deal magical fire damage to a target, the target loses -15% Physical Damage Reduction and -10% Projectile Damage Reduction for 2 seconds.

perks.name: Quick Chant
perks.description: Gain 15% Spell Casting Speed.

perks.name: Reactive Shield
perks.description: When you take damage, gain an arcane shield that lasts for 3 seconds. The shield can absorb 15 total damage and will only reactivate after a cooldown period.

perks.name: Sage
perks.description: Gain 15% Knowledge.

perks.name: Spell Overload
perks.description: Reduces Knowledge by 20% and increases all spells counts by 60%.

perks.name: Staff Mastery
perks.description: When using a staff-type weapon, you gain 2 Magical Damage.

skills.name: Arcane Shield
skills.description: Gain a shield around you that absorbs 15 damage from all damage sources for 12 seconds. When the maximum amount of absorb has been reached, the shield unleashes an Arcane Explosion, dealing 5 Magical Damage to enemy targets in a 2m radius around you.

skills.name: Intense Focus
skills.description: Reduce the cast time of your next spell to 0.1 seconds.

skills.name: Meditation
skills.description: Enter a meditative state and recover spells at a rate of 34 spells costs over 24 seconds.

skills.name: Spell Memory I
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize spells to use in the dungeon.

skills.name: Spell Memory II
skills.description: Gain the ability to memorize additional spells to use in the dungeon.

spells.name: Chain Lightning
spells.description:
Electrocute the target for 1 seconds, dealing 30 magical lightning damage, and fires lightning that is transferred to targets within a 8m area up to 3 times. It does not transfer to a target it was transferred to previously, and it transfers to the caster if you are nearby.

Electrified : The target loses -20% Move Speed.

spells.name: Explosion
spells.description:
When cast, an explosion occurs in the targeted area after 3 seconds, dealing 23 magical fire damage and inflicting burn over 2 seconds within a 1m area.

Burn: The target takes 3 magical fire damage.

spells.name: Fireball
spells.description:
Shoot a burning fireball, dealing 20 magical fire damage direct to a target and 10 magical fire damage splash, knocking back nearby targets and inflicting burn over 2 seconds.

Burn: The target takes 3 magical fire damage.

spells.name: Haste
spells.description: Grants the target 5% Move Speed, 10% Action Speed, 10% Spell Casting Speed for 6 seconds. Self cast if no target is found.

spells.name: Ice Bolt
spells.description:
Deal 30 magical ice damage to the target, inflicting frostbite for 1 seconds.

Frostbite: The target loses -20% Move Speed and -20% Action Speed.

spells.name: Ignite
spells.description:
Set the target's weapon on fire for 12 seconds. While active, deal 5 magical fire damage and inflict burn over 1 seconds on successful attacks.

Burn: The target takes 1 magical fire damage.

spells.name: Invisibility
spells.description: Grants the target invisibility for 4 seconds. While active, the target also gains 5% Move Speed. Self cast if no target is found.

spells.name: Slow
spells.description: Slows the target's Move Speed by 40% for 2 seconds.

spells.name: Light Orb
spells.description: Cast spheres of floating light to brightly illuminate your surroundings. Can force rogues out of hiding.

spells.name: Lightning Strike
spells.description:
When cast, a bolt of lightning strikes the targeted area, Electrocuting enemies for 1 seconds and dealing 30 magical lightning damage.

Electrified : The target loses -20% Move Speed.

spells.name: Magic Lock
spells.description: Lockable objects such as doors or boxes will be locked for 10 seconds.

spells.name: Magic Missile
spells.description: Fire up to 10 homing missile that each deal 10 magical arcane damage. Stops firing when you move.

spells.name: Zap
spells.description:
Deals 18 Magical Light Damage Base and burns the target over 1 second.

Burn: The target takes 1 magical fire damage.

spell_merge_recipes.result_description:
Deal 20 Lightning/Air Magical Damage to all targets within the area, push them back, and electrify them for 2 seconds.

Electrified: The target loses -20% Move Speed.

Deal 50 magical ice damage Fire/ to the target, inflicting burn over 3 seconds and frostbite for 2 seconds.

Burn: The target takes 3 magical fire damage.
Frostbite: The target loses -20% Move Speed and -20% Action Speed.

Blast radial flames forward for 5 seconds, dealing 20 magical fire damage per second and inflicting burn over 3 seconds on targets.

Burn: The target takes 3 magical fire damage.
Summon a Lava Elemental for 24 seconds. The Lava Elemental deals 10 magical fire damage per second to nearby enemies and leaves a trail of lava that deals 10 magical fire damage per second.
Erupts a thorn of earth, dealing 30 magical earth damage to all targets within the area.

Channel for 6 seconds to summon a lightning storm, dealing 10 magical lightning damage per second and electrifying all targets within the area.

Electrified: The target loses -20% Move Speed.
Create a mud shield in front of the caster for 6 seconds, blocking all damage. The shield remains fixed in its initial direction.

Erupt a wall of fire for 10 seconds, dealing 20 magical fire damage Earth/ instantly and 10 magical fire damage per second to all targets it touches and inflicting burn over 3 seconds.

Burn: The target takes 3 magical fire damage.
Upon casting, become frozen for 6 seconds, becoming immune to all damage and gaining a 50% Cooldown. The ice can be shattered by a powerful impact.

Transform into a lightning orb and quickly move to the selected location, electrifying all targets along the path and dealing 10 magical lightning damage. Upon reaching the destination, unleash a lightning strike, dealing 15 magical lightning damage to nearby targets. The caster is immune to physical attacks while moving but remains affected by area magic.

Electrified: The target loses -20% Move Speed.

Launch a water orb that engulfs the target, dealing 15 magical ice damage, trapping them, and lifting them into the air for 3 seconds. The orb bursts instantly upon taking physical damage, inflicting wet for 2 seconds.

Wet: The target loses -20% Move Speed and jump height is reduced by 30%.

After 4 seconds, self-detonate a plasma blast dealing 40 fire/lightning Magical Damage to any targets in range, including the caster. All targets are electrified for a further 2 seconds.

Electrified : The target loses -20% Move Speed.

Exhale an icy gust of breath forward, dealing 20 magical ice damage to all targets and inflicting frostbite for 2 seconds. The affected area remains frozen for 3 seconds, causing targets on the ice to lose -10% Move Speed.

Frostbite: The target loses -20% Move Speed and -20% Action Speed.

Fires a lightning bolt, dealing 15magical lightning damage and electrifying for 1 seconds. The bolt freezes shortly after, inflicting 15magical ice damage and immobilizing the target for 1.75 seconds.

Electrified: The target loses -20% Move Speed.
